## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Dimmo to discuss content strategy, website updates, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website restructuring planned: creating subfolders for alternatives and features to improve SEO](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Current blog performance: \~6 clicks, 8k impressions daily; 51k impressions, 10-15 clicks weekly](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Product page content review pending; decision on approach to be made after Troy's assessment](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Technical issues (image errors, CMS) to be addressed this week to unblock content publication](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Topics

### Website Restructuring

  - [Create subfolders: 'alternatives' and 'features' instead of single 'blog' folder](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Migrate existing articles to new structure (e.g., blog/salesforce-alternatives → alternatives/salesforce)](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Prateek to provide Excel sheet with URL mapping for migration](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Lucas to handle migration and implement 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [New Loom video needed to guide publishers on accessing different subfolder CMSs](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Progress

  - [Total articles: 108 (40 alternatives, 37 features, 31 software)](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [22 articles ready but on hold due to image errors](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [This week's focus: 15 new alternative articles](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Pre-publication: 0 clicks, 0 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Current daily: \~6 clicks, 8,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Weekly: 51,000 impressions, 10-15 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Recent feature articles getting 1-2 clicks each](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Product Pages

  - [Prateek to share AI-generated product page content by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Troy to review and decide on approach (GrowthX vs. custom prompts)](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Decision will determine method for creating all product pages](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Image errors preventing publication of 22 ready articles](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Related to recent migration; Lucas to address this week](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Future Optimization

  - [Internal linking strategy to be discussed next week](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Expectation: Continued growth in clicks and impressions post-restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lucas: Address CMS and image issues by next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Lucas: Implement website restructuring (subfolders, migration, redirects)](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Lucas: Create Loom video for publishers on new CMS structure](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Prateek: Share Excel sheet with URL mapping for migration](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Prateek: Deliver AI-generated product page content by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Both: Revisit internal linking strategy in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/eWzqEDyVhdHYAvqxXK9bjvAuyEkiezPH?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
